message:
🐛 Add writable emptyDir for settings directory in Helm chart (#2266)

The settings manager needs to write encryption keys and settings to
~/.kc/ (which resolves to /app/.kc/ in the container). With
readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, this fails silently, breaking OAuth
session management. Add an emptyDir volume mount at /app/.kc/ so
the settings manager can create its keyfile and settings.json.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
